attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID ,
TVOUTPUT.BK_PROJECT_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE START_DATE_ACTIVE,
COALESCE (MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_PROJECT_CODE ,
TVOUTPUT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC
ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') as END_DATE_ACTIVE,
TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
TVOUTPUT.SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,
TVOUTPUT.PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.RECLASS_ROLE,
TVOUTPUT.PARENT_ROLE,
TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
TVOUTPUT.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_PROJECT_CODE , TVOUTPUT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT 
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) as RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 and NFPTV.BK_PROJECT_CODE IS NOT NULL AND NFPTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT IS NOT NULL 
THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) as DML_TYPE,
TVOUTPUT.BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE
FROM
(
SELECT 
BATCH_ID, 
BK_PROJECT_CODE,
RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
START_TV_DATE,
CREATE_DATETIME,
RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME,
FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
CAST(SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT as DECIMAL(18,0)) AS SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,
PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
RECLASS_ROLE,
PARENT_ROLE,
SS_CODE,
SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
BK_COMPANY_CODE,
BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT,
ACTION_CODE,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_PROJECT_CODE, RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE, 
RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE, BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE, BK_COMPANY_CODE, BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT, 
RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT, RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT, FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME,
 FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG, SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT, FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR, 
PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
FROM
( 
  SELECT
	SSPI.BATCH_ID, 
	SSPI.PROJECT_VALUE BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	SSPI.RECLASS_PROJECT_VALUE RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
	CAST(COALESCE(SSPI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,SSPI.CREATE_DATETIME) AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	SSPI.CREATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME,
	SSPI.PARENT_PROJECT_VALUE RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
	SSPI.DEPARTMENT_VALUE BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	NFPLTV_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
	NFPLTV_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	NFPLTV_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	SSPI.PROJECT_NAME FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME,
	SSPI.ENABLED_FLAG FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	(CASE WHEN trim(SSPI.SPENDING_LEVEL) IN ('$250-500k','disabled','98 000','500 000','461 000') THEN '-999'
    /*ELSE TRIM(SSPI.SPENDING_LEVEL) END) SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT, */
     else TRIM(substr( SSPI.SPENDING_LEVEL, 1, index(SSPI.SPENDING_LEVEL,'.') +2))END) SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
	SSPI.USAGE_DESCRIPTION FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,
	CAST(SSPI.PROGRAM_MANAGER AS INTEGER) PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
	(CASE WHEN SSPI.RECLASS_PROJECT_VALUE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) RECLASS_ROLE,
	(CASE WHEN SSPI.PARENT_PROJECT_VALUE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) PARENT_ROLE,
	'N/A' SS_CODE,
	SSPI.PROJECT_VALUE SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
	SSPI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
	NFDT.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	NFPC.BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT,
	SSPI.ACTION_CODE
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.ST_SI_PROJECT_INFO SSPI
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_CATEGORY NFPC
	ON NFPC.BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT=SSPI.PROJECT_CATEGORY_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFDT
	ON SSPI.DEPARTMENT_VALUE=TRIM(NFDT.BK_COMPANY_CODE)||TRIM(NFDT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE),
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV_BPLI
	WHERE 
	SSPI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID=NFPLTV_BPLI.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT
	AND NFPLTV_BPLI.END_TV_DATE=16000101
	and SSPI.PROJECT_VALUE not in  (  /* Rel8 RCR , Added  SSPI.PROJECT_VALUE  not in clause */
				  SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y' 
				  UNION/* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
				  SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y' 
				  UNION 
				  SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG='Y' 
				    and SOGCC.SEGMENT6 NOT IN (SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
												UNION/* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
												SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y' 		) 
				  union
				  SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_VALUE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_MF_OM_GCC_PROJECT_INFO where USAGE_DESCRIPTION = 'NON-SI-PROJECT' 
			      union 
				  SELECT NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV NFPT WHERE NFPT.END_TV_DATE=16000101 AND NFPT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR = 'NON-SI-PROJECT'
				  ) /* Rel8 RCR , Added  SSPI.PROJECT_VALUE  not in clause */
  union all 
	SELECT 
	SMGCC.BATCH_ID , 
	SMGCC.SEGMENT6 BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	'N/A' RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
	CAST(SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE ,
	SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME,
	'N/A' RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
	'N/A' BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	NCOA_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
	-999 RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	-999 RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	 COALESCE(EECGP.PROJECT_NAME,'NON-SI-PROJECT')  FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME, /* Modified Logic */
	SMGCC.ENABLED_FLAG FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	'-999' SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
	'NON-SI-PROJECT' FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,
	-999 PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
	'N/A' RECLASS_ROLE,
	'N/A' PARENT_ROLE,
	'N/A' SS_CODE,
	'N/A' SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
	SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT1 BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	-999 BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT,
	SMGCC.ACTION_CODE
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SMGCC
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA_BPLI
	ON  SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA_BPLI.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	Left Outer Join $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_CFI_GL_PROJECTS EECGP  /* Added this view  on  April 13 th 2009*/
	ON (EECGP.PROJECT_SEGMENT =  SMGCC.SEGMENT6
		/* and EECGP.GLOBAL_NAME ='US' */ )/* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
 	WHERE
        SMGCC.ENABLED_FLAG='Y' 
       AND SMGCC.SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL  /* Rel8 RCR ,Taken out the NOT IN clause  as part of priority Change */
       QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SMGCC.SEGMENT6  , NCOA_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME
    order by  SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME  DESC) = 1
union all
SELECT 
	SMGCC.BATCH_ID , 
	SMGCC.SEGMENT6 BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	'N/A' RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
	CAST(SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE ,
	SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME,
	'N/A' RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
	'N/A' BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	NCOA_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
	-999 RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	-999 RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	 COALESCE(EECGP.PROJECT_NAME,'NON-SI-PROJECT')  FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME, /* Modified Logic */
	SMGCC.ENABLED_FLAG FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	'-999' SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
	'NON-SI-PROJECT' FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,
	-999 PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
	'N/A' RECLASS_ROLE,
	'N/A' PARENT_ROLE,
	'N/A' SS_CODE,
	'N/A' SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
	SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT1 BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	-999 BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT,
	SMGCC.ACTION_CODE
	FROM /* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SMGCC
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA_BPLI
	ON  SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA_BPLI.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	Left Outer Join $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_CFI_GL_PROJECTS EECGP  /* Added this view  on  April 13 th 2009*/
	ON (EECGP.PROJECT_SEGMENT =  SMGCC.SEGMENT6
		)
 	WHERE
        SMGCC.ENABLED_FLAG='Y' 
       AND SMGCC.SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL  
       QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SMGCC.SEGMENT6  , NCOA_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME
    order by  SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME  DESC) = 1	
UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	SOGCC.BATCH_ID ,
	SOGCC.SEGMENT6 BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	'N/A' RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
	CAST(SOGCC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	SOGCC.CREATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME,
	'N/A' RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
	'N/A' BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	NCOA_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
	-999 RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	-999 RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	 COALESCE(EECGP.PROJECT_NAME,'NON-SI-PROJECT')  FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME, /*  Modified Logic */
	SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	'-999' SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
	'NON-SI-PROJECT' FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,
	-999 PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
	'N/A' RECLASS_ROLE,
	'N/A' PARENT_ROLE,
	'N/A' SS_CODE,
	'N/A' SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
	SOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
	SOGCC.SEGMENT1 BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	-999 BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT,
	SOGCC.ACTION_CODE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA_BPLI 
	ON  SOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID=NCOA_BPLI.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	Left Outer Join $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_CFI_GL_PROJECTS EECGP /* Added this view  on April 13 th 2009 */
	ON (EECGP.PROJECT_SEGMENT =  SOGCC.SEGMENT6
		and EECGP.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' )
	WHERE 
       SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
       AND SOGCC.SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL 
       AND SOGCC.SEGMENT6 NOT IN ( SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL  and ENABLED_FLAG='Y' 
	   UNION /* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
	   SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL  and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
	   )			
			/*	  union all
				  SELECT NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV NFPT WHERE NFPT.END_TV_DATE=16000101 AND NFPT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR = 'NON-SI-PROJECT') /* Used FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR <> 'NON-SI-PROJECT', instead of 
				  FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME <> 'NON-SI-PROJECT'   Added on April 13 th 2009 */
				  /* Rel8 RCR  , Commented this 3NF union all */
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SOGCC.SEGMENT6  , NCOA_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,SOGCC.CREATE_DATETIME
    order by  SOGCC.CREATE_DATETIME  DESC) = 1
	UNION ALL
SELECT  
	EXSMOGPI.BATCH_ID, 
	EXSMOGPI.PROJECT_VALUE BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	EXSMOGPI.RECLASS_PROJECT_VALUE RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
	CAST(COALESCE(EXSMOGPI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,EXSMOGPI.CREATE_DATETIME) AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
	EXSMOGPI.CREATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME,
	EXSMOGPI.PARENT_PROJECT_VALUE RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
	EXSMOGPI.DEPARTMENT_VALUE BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	NFPLTV_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
	NFPLTV_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	NFPLTV_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	case when  EXSMOGPI.PROJECT_NAME = 'NON-SI-PROJECT' 
	     then COALESCE(EECGP.PROJECT_NAME,'NON-SI-PROJECT')
         else EXSMOGPI.PROJECT_NAME  END as  FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME,  /* Modified Logic*/
	EXSMOGPI.ENABLED_FLAG FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	(CASE WHEN trim(EXSMOGPI.SPENDING_LEVEL) IN ('$250-500k','disabled','98 000','500 000','461 000') THEN '-999'
    /*ELSE TRIM(EXSMOGPI.SPENDING_LEVEL) END) SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT, */
    else TRIM(substr( EXSMOGPI.SPENDING_LEVEL, 1, index(EXSMOGPI.SPENDING_LEVEL,'.') +2))END) SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
    EXSMOGPI.USAGE_DESCRIPTION   FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,   /* Modified Expection Query for this column */
	CAST(EXSMOGPI.PROGRAM_MANAGER AS INTEGER) PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
	(CASE WHEN EXSMOGPI.RECLASS_PROJECT_VALUE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) 
	RECLASS_ROLE,
	(CASE WHEN EXSMOGPI.PARENT_PROJECT_VALUE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) PARENT_ROLE,
	'N/A' SS_CODE,
	EXSMOGPI.PROJECT_VALUE SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
	EXSMOGPI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
	NFDT.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	NFPCC.BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT,
	EXSMOGPI.ACTION_CODE
	FROM 
	$$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_MF_OM_GCC_PROJECT_INFO EXSMOGPI
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_CATEGORY NFPCC
	ON NFPCC.BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT=EXSMOGPI.PROJECT_CATEGORY_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFDT
	ON EXSMOGPI.DEPARTMENT_VALUE=TRIM(NFDT.BK_COMPANY_CODE)||TRIM(NFDT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  (select * from  $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_CFI_GL_PROJECTS EECGP1  /* Added on  April 13 th 2009 */
				 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EECGP1.PROJECT_SEGMENT
				 ORDER BY EECGP1.GLOBAL_NAME DESC) = 1
 				)EECGP
 		ON (EECGP.PROJECT_SEGMENT =  EXSMOGPI.PROJECT_VALUE )
 	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV_BPLI
      ON(EXSMOGPI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID=NFPLTV_BPLI.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT
	    AND NFPLTV_BPLI.END_TV_DATE=16000101  )
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY EXSMOGPI.PROJECT_VALUE  ,	NFPLTV_BPLI.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT  ,EXSMOGPI.CREATE_DATETIME
    order by  EXSMOGPI.CREATE_DATETIME  DESC) = 1
UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	-999 BATCH_ID, 
	BK_PROJECT_CODE,
	RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJECT_CODE,
	START_TV_DATE,
	EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME,
	RU_BK_PARENT_PROJECT_CODE,
	BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
	RU_BK_RECLASS_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	RU_BK_PARENT_PROJ_LCLTY_INT,
	FINANCIAL_PROJECT_PROJECT_NAME,
	FINANCIAL_PROJECT_ENABLED_FLAG,
	CAST(SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT AS VARCHAR(50)) SPENDING_LEVEL_AMOUNT,
	FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR,
	CAST(PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY AS INTEGER) PROGRAM_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
	RECLASS_ROLE,
	PARENT_ROLE,
	SS_CODE,
	SK_PROJECT_VALUE_NUM,
	SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
	BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	BK_FIN_PROJ_CATEGORY_ID_INT,
	'X' ACTION_CODE
	FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV NFPT
		WHERE EXISTS (select 1 from (  /* Rel8 RCR , Modified  priority  for this */
			SELECT  SEGMENT6 PROJECT_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  
				      where SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
			UNION ALL/* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
				SELECT  SEGMENT6 PROJECT_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  
				      where SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
			UNION ALL
			SELECT SEGMENT6 PROJECT_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC 
				   WHERE  SOGCC.SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL  and SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG='Y' and SOGCC.SEGMENT6 NOT IN 
			       (SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
UNION SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'				   ) 
			UNION ALL/* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
			SELECT EXMOGPI.PROJECT_VALUE PROJECT_VALUE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_MF_OM_GCC_PROJECT_INFO EXMOGPI 
				WHERE EXMOGPI.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' AND EXMOGPI.PROJECT_VALUE IS NOT NULL
			UNION ALL
		    SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.ST_SI_PROJECT_INFO
    		       where PROJECT_VALUE not in  (
						 SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
						  UNION /* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
						  SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
						  UNION
						  SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
						    and SOGCC.SEGMENT6 NOT IN (SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
							UNION SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y') 
						  union/* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
						  SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_VALUE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_MF_OM_GCC_PROJECT_INFO where USAGE_DESCRIPTION = 'NON-SI-PROJECT' 
					      union 
						  SELECT NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV NFPT WHERE NFPT.END_TV_DATE=16000101 AND NFPT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR = 'NON-SI-PROJECT'
						          ) /* Rel8 RCR , Modified  priority  for this */
                   ) SPROJVAL
WHERE SPROJVAL.PROJECT_VALUE=NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE
AND NFPT.END_TV_DATE=16000101)
) TVINPUT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_PROJECT_CODE ,TVINPUT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT, 
TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV NFPTV
ON TVOUTPUT.BK_PROJECT_CODE = NFPTV.BK_PROJECT_CODE
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT = NFPTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT 
AND NFPTV.END_TV_DATE =16000101
WHERE 
TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT
	BATCH_ID,
	PROJECT_VALUE,
	PROJECT_NAME,
	DEPARTMENT_VALUE,
	ENABLED_FLAG,
	SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID,
	PARENT_PROJECT_VALUE,
	PROGRAM_MANAGER,
	PROJECT_CATEGORY_ID,
	RECLASS_PROJECT_VALUE,
	SPENDING_LEVEL,
	USAGE_DESCRIPTION, /* Apr 2009 , Modified to 'NON-SI-PROJECT' */
	GES_UPDATE_DATE,
	CREATE_DATETIME,
	ACTION_CODE,
	EXCEPTION_TYPE FROM (
SELECT 
	SMGCC.BATCH_ID,
	SMGCC.SEGMENT6 PROJECT_VALUE,
	'NON-SI-PROJECT' PROJECT_NAME,
	'N/A' DEPARTMENT_VALUE,
	SMGCC.ENABLED_FLAG ENABLED_FLAG,
	SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID,
	'N/A' PARENT_PROJECT_VALUE,
	-999 PROGRAM_MANAGER,
	-999 PROJECT_CATEGORY_ID,
	'N/A' RECLASS_PROJECT_VALUE,
	'N/A' SPENDING_LEVEL,
	'NON-SI-PROJECT' USAGE_DESCRIPTION, /* Apr 2009 , Modified to 'NON-SI-PROJECT' */
	SMGCC.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
	SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SMGCC.ACTION_CODE,
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SMGCC
UNION
SELECT 
	SMGCC1.BATCH_ID,
	SMGCC1.SEGMENT6 PROJECT_VALUE,
	'NON-SI-PROJECT' PROJECT_NAME,
	'N/A' DEPARTMENT_VALUE,
	SMGCC1.ENABLED_FLAG ENABLED_FLAG,
	SMGCC1.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID,
	'N/A' PARENT_PROJECT_VALUE,
	-999 PROGRAM_MANAGER,
	-999 PROJECT_CATEGORY_ID,
	'N/A' RECLASS_PROJECT_VALUE,
	'N/A' SPENDING_LEVEL,
	'NON-SI-PROJECT' USAGE_DESCRIPTION, /* Apr 2009 , Modified to 'NON-SI-PROJECT' */
	SMGCC1.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
	SMGCC1.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SMGCC1.ACTION_CODE,
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SMGCC1) SMGCC /* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
WHERE PROJECT_VALUE is not null  /* Rel8 RCR,  added SEGMENT6 is not null  */
AND  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA_BPLI 
	WHERE SMGCC.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID = NCOA_BPLI.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT )
and SMGCC.ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
	SOGCC.BATCH_ID,
	SOGCC.SEGMENT6 PROJECT_VALUE,
	'NON-SI-PROJECT' PROJECT_NAME,
	'N/A' DEPARTMENT_VALUE,
	SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG ENABLED_FLAG,
	SOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID,
	'N/A' PARENT_PROJECT_VALUE,
	-999 PROGRAM_MANAGER,
	-999 PROJECT_CATEGORY_ID,
	'N/A' RECLASS_PROJECT_VALUE,
	'N/A' SPENDING_LEVEL,
	'NON-SI-PROJECT' USAGE_DESCRIPTION, /* Apr 2009, Modified to 'NON-SI-PROJECT' */
	SOGCC.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
	SOGCC.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SOGCC.ACTION_CODE,
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC 
WHERE SEGMENT6 is not null  /* Rel8 RCR added SEGMENT6 is not null  */
and  SOGCC.SEGMENT6 NOT IN /* Rel8 RCR, Taken out SI table */
	( SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL  and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
	/* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
	UNION SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL  and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
	)
AND NOT EXISTS 
     (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA_BPLI 
           WHERE SOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = NCOA_BPLI.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT )
and SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
	SSPI.BATCH_ID,
	SSPI.PROJECT_VALUE, 
	SSPI.PROJECT_NAME, 
	SSPI.DEPARTMENT_VALUE, 
	SSPI.ENABLED_FLAG, 
	SSPI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID, 
	SSPI.PARENT_PROJECT_VALUE, 
	cast(SSPI.PROGRAM_MANAGER AS INTEGER), 
	SSPI.PROJECT_CATEGORY_ID, 
	SSPI.RECLASS_PROJECT_VALUE, 
	SSPI.SPENDING_LEVEL, 
	SSPI.USAGE_DESCRIPTION, 
	SSPI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
	SSPI.CREATE_DATETIME, 
	SSPI.ACTION_CODE, 
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_SI_PROJECT_INFO SSPI
WHERE SSPI.DEPARTMENT_VALUE IS NOT NULL 
and SSPI.PROJECT_VALUE not in  (  /* Rel8 RCR , Added  SSPI.PROJECT_VALUE  not in clause */
				  	  SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
				UNION/* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'				
				  UNION 
				  SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and SOGCC.ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
				    and SOGCC.SEGMENT6 /* ADDD AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT Q1FY14 */
				     NOT IN (SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y'
					 UNION SELECT SEGMENT6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  WHERE SEGMENT6 IS NOT NULL and ENABLED_FLAG='Y') 
			      union 
				  SELECT NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV NFPT WHERE NFPT.END_TV_DATE=16000101 AND NFPT.FINANCIAL_PROJECT_USAGE_DESCR = 'NON-SI-PROJECT'
               )
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV_BPLI WHERE SSPI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID=NFPLTV_BPLI.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT AND NFPLTV_BPLI.END_TV_DATE=16000101)
